{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kethri
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kethri]] is a woman who mutters about not getting paid.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“We’re not getting paid for this,” Kethri muttered.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
